fields.name: Acrobatics
fields.description: Agile movement - balance, tumbling, escaping grapples, landing safely.

fields.name: Athletics
fields.description: Physical exertion - climbing, swimming, jumping, lifting, pushing.

fields.name: Concentration
fields.description: Maintaining mental focus - sustaining spells, ignoring distractions, working through pain.

fields.name: Initiative
fields.description: Reaction speed at combat start - who acts first.

fields.name: Insight
fields.description: Reading people and situations - detecting lies, sensing motives, understanding context.

fields.name: Magic Attack
fields.description: Offensive spellcasting rolls - direct damage spells, offensive enchantments.

fields.name: Magic Control
fields.description: Precision in spellcasting - avoiding backfire, targeting accurately, shaping effects.

fields.name: Magic Defense
fields.description: Resisting magical effects - spell resistance, counterspell, dispelling.

fields.name: Medicine
fields.description: Healing and diagnosis - treating wounds, identifying ailments, stabilizing dying.

fields.name: Perception
fields.description: Sensory awareness - spotting hidden things, hearing whispers, noticing details.

fields.name: Physical Defense
fields.description: Avoiding or mitigating physical attacks - dodge, block, parry.

fields.name: Presence
fields.description: Force of personality - commanding attention, social dominance, first impressions.

fields.name: Ranged Attack
fields.description: Distance combat offensive rolls - archery, thrown weapons, firearm attacks.

fields.name: Resist Corruption
fields.description: Resisting abyssal influence - maintaining self against dark temptation, purity checks.

fields.name: Willpower
fields.description: Mental fortitude - resisting fear, charm, domination, psychological effects.
